use_cases: Displaying monthly calendar views with pill-styled date cells
Navigating between months using prev/next buttons
Selecting single dates for scheduling applications
Selecting date ranges for booking systems
Integrating into appointment or event management interfaces
ai_summary: A minimalist calendar component featuring pill-styled date cells with rounded-full styling and subtle hover states. Built on react-aria-components with navigation controls, day headers, and support for both single and range date selection. Clean, functional design suitable for appointment scheduling, task management, and booking interfaces across various industries.
